Birth Of Dishtler

Fri Apr 03 2026 20:00:00 GMT-0400 (Eastern Daylight Time)

The conversation went worse than predicted, Grace was right. I had a vision of curbstomping a girl and it calmed me. Outright denying the existence of dishes. Now it's time to track every dish. Meticulously. On a spreadsheet by meal times. I’m going to timelapse myself doing the dishes. I will be the dish dictator. I will be the Dishtler of our Auschswsink. Abwaschen Macht Frei!
